title: Employee’s rights against employer not affected
content:
Nothing in this Part shall prejudice the right of an employee to 
recover any wages due to him by an employer directly from the 
employer.
Last updated date
29.6.2017
Employment Ordinance
Part IXA	
9A-22
Section 43K	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
Part IXB
Offence of Employer’s Failure to Pay any Sum 
Payable under Award of Labour Tribunal or Minor 
Employment Claims Adjudication Board
(Part IXB added 9 of 2010 s. 4. Format changes—E.R. 3 of 2015)
